title: Tender Mexican Corn Flan
description: A tender and briny Mexican dish featuring garlic granules, perfect for a vegetarian brunch, served in a tagliere vessel.

ingredients.name: mexican cheese
ingredients.notes: such as queso fresco or Monterey Jack

ingredients.name: glaze
ingredients.notes: such as honey or agave nectar

instructions: In a blender, puree corn kernels, garlic granules, and chili powder until smooth.
In a bowl, whisk together eggs, sour cream, and salt.
Add the corn mixture to the bowl and stir until combined.
Stir in mexican cheese until well combined.
Pour the mixture into a tagliere vessel or a 9x13 inch baking dish.
Bake for 35 minutes or until the edges are set and the center is slightly jiggly.
While the flan is baking, prepare the glaze by heating it in a saucepan over low heat until warm and runny.
Remove the flan from the oven and brush the glaze over the top.
Return the flan to the oven and bake for an additional 5 minutes or until the glaze is caramelized.
